message:
beads: record bd-huh.5 and bd-3sj lifecycle updates and closure evidence

Persists the issue-tracker state transitions and audit comments generated during implementation and validation work.

Detailed changes:
- Update issue state for bd-huh.5 to closed with close reason after ext4 rw e2e smoke delivery and gate evidence.
- Update issue state for bd-3sj to closed with close reason after delayed-ref implementation and gate evidence.
- Record implementation comments containing acceptance-criteria mapping and verification command outcomes for traceability.
- Preserve concurrent tracker updates (including in-progress status updates for active related work) without rewriting unrelated issue history.

Rationale: this commit isolates tracker/audit metadata from code changes and keeps bead state synchronized with the shipped implementation commits.
